message.body: thats what id always been told, but i wouldnt have been surprised if that was actually wrong
this first phase is really hard
@FFyte all huh? it sounds like it's kind of an expensive brand so that's certainly an approach to marketing LUL
nah, it's probably VERY generic porridge
just slightly more expensive than store brand
no, like. the last time wolsk streaming this we had a native mention it was expensive
granted i did nothing to fact check this so
I mean, sure I can buy 500g of oat meal for ~0.35€ or ~1€
yeah i'd say nearly triple the price is expensive
28DKK/kg, vs. ~9DKK/kg, so the difference is a factor ~4
my local store is ~0.72€/kg vs. 2.27€/kg for 'known brand product'
so that's a factor of three
so what did you have for breakfast, 44?
the different between 'store brand' corn flakes and kellogg's is a factor of just under 4, so math checks out
yeah like i said. that's not rare. but it is dumb
reminds me I need to go make coffee soon
especially given how many 'store brands' are literally from the same sources, just in a different box
Hey how come this boss sucks so much
i wouldnt say it sucks yet
phase 1 is really annoying, but i dont hate it atm
I like to get ahead of things just in case
And also hey hi hey hey hi hey
you're getting the one-cycle at least more often than not
i would say it sucks but that's because i'm a shitter
yeah if i dont, i basically dont clear lol
because the wave attack fucking blows
i just dont get how to do that consistently
I'm not sure there was an 'out'
the top/bottom aren't targetted (although that's pattern too if you do it the same way)
the position they spawn at, and the angle they shoot at is all targeted aka pattern
now we've reached the hard part lol
i cant get back to the lovetrap attack this is so annoying
i knew itd push me one last time but that is not what i expected lol
oh this is actually a good thing
because that blue wall is the last one, i can just stay center after and not have to do another weird crossover
isnt there another fight in like k3 that has the walk back and forth strat?
except it desyncs in that fight and pisses me the fuck off
but it's a very famous attack in general
was just going a little too fast
i literally just did not see those
Those are surprise bullets for later
i will say, im glad im improving at the wave attack
thought itd always feel like luck to me
fucking christ i can tell this is gonna be hard
okay that fight was extremely fun tbh
they made the first lovetrap attack ive ever liked
i'll just play this for a bit
oh god 7 trials in the first one LMAO
i stepped away, did you do it?
just went back and watched it. hell yeah
i feel like the save is gonna be fake or something lol
The save was real, but the stage was fake
you're supposed to go under it OpieOP
i did unironically consider that briefly
i wonder if its even possible
now are you a precision gamer or a consistency gamer
ive never done a double upwards plane and lean towards it for that reason
second jump looks like an old man with a moustache
tt do you know how to do a double plane
or have any resources thatd explain it
I know there's like a valign set up you wanna do at the start
it's 3f 15p 19f and if you wanna get the timing no-death mode is better syadouNerd
people flaunting their fangame phd's in here smh
yeah you should learn it on 50
it's really weird when it's so slow
well yeah obv i should do it on 50 lol
jus trying to make sure i understand it
i might not be built for this
This seems like some kind of elaborate torture device tbh
fangames that are even slightly trying to be 'good' won't require this
somehow ppl have done 8 of these in a row
those people should be studied for the good of humanity
maybe the play is to do it at 100fps so 50fps feels like slow motion
Practicing all jumps at 800fps to become unstoppable
it'll be like you're in the matrix
Just do that 1000 times in a row ez
well you don't need to be consistent at it at least
having to do the bonks first will be so annoying
well there is reliable setup for 0.20 if you save 1 pixel above ground
1 more and we can do attempts i guess lol
how would i know if im saved 1 pixel off the ground though

I'm totally not against anything you're playing in alt channel, but are you planning for a surprise to normal viewers "hello guys I've been playing K2 warped and now at final boss!" or no special meaning is hidden behind anyways?
the special meaning is "i feel like playing and dont feel like talking"
wolsk already streamed k2 warped on main
yeah most of it has been on main lol
and you caught this one? you have odd luck
oh no im a frame too far right lol
gotta grind for the death achievements obviously wolskCola

yeah but a sad way to die still
well you've done a double upwards plane now
that's the wrong kind of consistency wolsk
i cant believe how quickly i developed some amount of consistency lmfdao
time to hit double upward planes all the time just to flex
i just need to keep an eye out for the red screen
this is harder than the double plane
the monkey's paw grants you one high gravity double downward's plane
@44m44 i have the flying dutchmans voice stuck in my head now. the monkeys paw. the monkey!
but devine...... it's the monkey chain, the monkey's fist, the monkey... smh
wolsk mod WutFace I'm outta here
@Wolsk its been like 20 years. gimme a break
ZAMN, this homie went from boss 5 to catastrophe in the 20 mins it took amelia to beat originality boss 2

and this will have 2 loops for the energy

energy should be just to the left of save after trap loop
maybe you gotta do froot loops

then the question is where the trigger is

ah i see you didnt say open sesame
i figured wolsk had just missed the trigger or something but uh...

okay so i guess if you go to far it just says "nvm"
guess that's to keep it a secret

oh, 5 from bosses comes out more reasonable
wow almost every spike moves now! so fun~
there arent gonna be any spikes at the end after this

This used to be a double upwards plane stream...
i think i might need to stop soon lol

this is the LEAST memorable trap ever

this time you won't get hit by jonny flingspike for sure
Roughly the same sensation as when I slammed my right pinkie toe into my chair three times over the course of the day yesterday
fool me once shame on me
